torch_pattern: x = x.float(); x = x * scalar; x = x + attention_mask; out = torch.softmax(x, dim=-1)
applicability_notes: constraints: {'in_place': True, 'mask_required': True, 'mask_broadcast': 'hw_dims_only (mask shared across batch/head dims)', 'softmax_dim': -1, 'input_must_be_sharded': True}

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-slice attention score matrix [batch*heads_slice, seq_len, seq_len], block-/height-sharded across grid
placement_observations.source: model call sites: program_config=SOFTMAX_PROGCFG / SOFTMAX_OPTIMIZED_PROGCFG built from mm_output_height_shard_spec; op consumes height-sharded matmul output slice in L1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-slice causal mask (one slice per seq-len slice i: attention_mask[i] / attention_masks_per_slice[i])
placement_observations.source: model call sites: mask indexed per slice and passed unsharded alongside sharded input (sliced prefill attention pattern)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: full softmax output assembled from num_slices slices
